title: About Us
content: It is a non-political and human welfare oriented non-government organization steadfast to contribute and promote national development through upgrading the socio-economic condition of the disadvantaged and under-privileged communities of the society. It has been working tirelessly since January 2019. It is a non-political and human welfare oriented non-government organization steadfast to contribute and promote national development.

services.title: For Ummah, With Sunnah
services.subtitle: It is a non-political and human welfare oriented non-government organization steadfast.

items.title: Da'wah
items.description: Establishing and managing madrasas with an integrated syllabus of religious and general education to produce distinguished Islamic scholars and contemporary da'wah practitioners.

items.title: Education
items.description: Empowering the poor, providing relief and rehabilitation for flood victims, installing tube wells and water purification plants, tree plantation, distributing winter clothing.

items.title: Service
items.description: Online-based da'wah, writing and publishing Islamic books, conducting religious study circles, and organizing training programs and workshops for Islamic outreach.
